species: Gametocytes of the human pathogen, Plasmodium falciparum, adopt a crescent shape.
tissue: Transmission of malaria parasites relies on the formation of a specialized blood form called the gametocyte.
cell_type: Transmission of malaria parasites relies on the formation of a specialized blood form called the gametocyte.
disease_state: Transmission of malaria parasites relies on the formation of a specialized blood form called the gametocyte.
sample_source: Gametocytes of the human pathogen, Plasmodium falciparum...
age: The shape changes are thought to facilitate the mechanical sequestration of maturing gametocytes within the bone marrow and spleen, as well as the eventual release into the circulation.
